LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF ALEX YAKOVLEV MOTION TO TRANSFER THIS ACTION FROM THE SUPERIOR COURT OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, TO COUNTY OF SAN DIEGO SUPERIOR COURT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: OFF CALENDAR, AS MOOT. COMPLAINT WAS DISMISSED ON 11/24/2009. (MATTER WAS PREVIOUSLY HEARD BY JUDGE KAHN ON 11/24/09) (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) (IN OPEN COURT, MR. WALKER IS GIVEN A COPY OF PLAINTIFF'S PROPOSED ORDER REGARDING THE DISMISSAL HEARD ON 11/24/09 BEFORE JUDGE KAHN, AND COUNSEL NOTES FOR THE RECORD THAT THE TITLE IS INCORRECT, AND THAT PLAINTIFF HAS ADDED ADDITIONAL LANGUAGE WHICH WAS NOT PART OF JUDGE KAHN'S RULING THAT DAY.) LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ALEX YAKOVLEV MOTION FOR ORDER TO SET AIDE AND VACATE DISMISSAL. DUE TO ORAL SURGERY OF PLAINTIFF, THE COURT CONTINUES THE MATTER FROM NOV-17-2009 TO NOV-24-2009. (THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING WILL BE THE SAME.). THE COURT CLERK WILL NOTIFY DEFENSE COUNSEL OF THE NEW DAY BY PHONE. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: BRENDA FIELDS, CSR #7235

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ALEX YAKOVLEV MOTION FOR ORDER TO SET AIDE AND VACATE DISMISSAL. ARGUED AND THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULES AS FOLLOWS: THE ORDER ENTERED ON APRIL 13, 2009 DISMISSING THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE IS NOW CHANGED TO THE FOLLOWING: THE ACTION IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO FILE A SMALL CLAIMS ACTION IN THIS MATTER. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Order Transfering Case To Appropriate Court (Change Of Venue)
Off Calendar Dec-22-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ALEX YAKOVLEV MOTION TO TRANSFER this action from the Superior Court of the State of California, County of San Francisco, to County of San Diego Superior Court Appearances: Alex Yakovlev, Plaintiff in Pro Per appearing and moving party; Henry Walker, Esq. of Crosby & Rowell LLP (510) 267-0300, appearing for Defendant and opposing party. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar, as moot. Complaint was dismissed on 11/24/2009. (Matter was previously heard by Judge Kahn on 11/24/09) (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (In Open Court, Mr. Walker is given a copy of Plaintiff's proposed Order regarding the dismissal heard on 11/24/09 before Judge Kahn, and counsel notes for the record that the title is incorrect, and that plaintiff has added additional language which was not part of Judge Kahn's ruling that day.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Notice Of Motion Andotion For Order To Set Aide And Vacate Dismissal
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ALEX YAKOVLEV Motion for Order to Set Aide and Vacate Dismissal. Plaintiff Alex Yakovlev, appearing in Pro Per and Moving party; Susan Kim, Esq. of Crosby & Rowell (510) 267-0300 Appearing thru CourtCall for Defendant and opposing party. Argued and the Court vacated its tentative ruling and rules as follows: The Order entered on April 13, 2009 dismissing the action with prejudice is now changed to the following: the action is dismissed without prejudice to allow Plaintiff to file a small claims action in this matter. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/HEK)Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR # 5797

Notice Of Motion Andotion For Order To Set Aide And Vacate Dismissal
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Continued To Nov-24-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ALEX YAKOVLEV Motion for Order to Set Aide and Vacate Dismissal. Plaintiff Alex Yakovlev, in Pro Per and moving party. There are no other appearances. Hearing held. Due to oral surgery of Plaintiff's, the Court continues the matter to November 24, 2009. (The Court's tentative ruling will be the same.). The Court clerk with notify Defense counsel of the new day by phone. (302/HEK)JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, REPORTER: BRENDA FIELDS, CSR # 7235

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Set Aside And Vacate Dismissal

Improper notice; Plaintiff failed to comply with Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b). (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-27-2009 Off Calendar

AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-13-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. The Court vacates ruling of March 27, 2009 as erroneous. Appearances: Alex Yakovlev, Plaintiff in Pro Per appearing and opposing party; Susan Kim, Esq. of of Crosby & Rowell LLP (510) 267-0300, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Plaintiff failed to give notice, pursuant to San Francisco Local Rule 8.3. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained without leave to amend. Order signed in open Court.(302KOPP/VC)Judge: Quentin Kopp; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Sustained with ten days leave to amend. No opposition filed. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
